column1: This file was created using the 202602 CRSP database.
It contains value- weighted returns for the intersections of  5 ME portfolios
The portfolios are constructed monthly.  ME is market cap at the end of the
previous month.  PRIOR_RET is from -60 to -13.
Missing data are indicated by -99.99 or -999.
